title: Rebels (disambiguation)
content:
'''Rebels''' may refer to one of the following:

==[[Canon]]==
*The '''[[Alliance to Restore the Republic]]''', commonly known as the '''Rebels'''
*The '''[[Resistance]]''', referred to as '''Rebels''' by members of the Resistance and the [[First Order]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*The '''[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]''', commonly known as the '''Rebels'''

==Real world==
*'''''[[Star Wars Rebels]]''''', a 3D CGI animated television series that ran from [[2014]] to [[2018]] produced by [[Lucasfilm Animation]].
*'''[[Star Wars Rebels (webcomic)|''Star Wars Rebels'']]''', a manga webcomic adaptation of the series
**'''''[[Star Wars Rebels, Vol. 1]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars Rebels, Vol. 2]]'''''
**'''''[[Star Wars Rebels, Vol. 3]]'''''
*'''[[Star Wars Rebels (TPB)|''Star Wars Rebels'']]''', a trade paperback collection of ''[[Star Wars Rebels Magazine]]'' comic strips

{{Disambig}}
